---
title: "Intro to SQL"
subtitle: Day 25
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: ../img/shiny-logo.png
  data-background-size: 40%
  data-background-position: right
  data-background-opacity: "0.8"
  data-slide-number: none
format: 
  revealjs:
    incremental: true
    code-copy: true
    code-link: true
    scrollable: true
auto-stretch: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

library(countdown)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(palmerpenguins)
library(patchwork)
library(ggthemes)
library(nycflights23)
library(here)
library(httr2)
library(rvest)
library(mdsr)
library(DBI)
slides_theme = theme_minimal(
  base_family = "Atkinson Hyperlegible",
  base_size = 16)

theme_set(slides_theme)
```

## Warm up: more time for shiny app??


## Warm Up: on your own

::: {.task .nonincremental}
Load `flights23 <- nycflights23::flights` and write {dplyr} code to do the following

1. Compute the number of flights in each year in the dataset
2. Compute the average flight delay by carrier for flights to Minneapolis
:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
countdown(3)
```

## Warm Up: in groups of ~3

::: {.task .nonincremental}
????
:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
countdown(4)
```

## 

If you run the following code in R.... 

```{r}
year_summary <- nycflights23::flights %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(
    n = n()
  )

class(year_summary)
```

## 

```{r}
#| code-line-numbers: "1|2|3"
#| eval: false
db <- dbConnect_scidb("airlines")
flights <- tbl(db, "flights")
carriers <- tbl(db, "carriers")
```

## 

```{r}
#| eval: false

year_summary <- flights %>% 
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(
    n = n()
  )

class(year_summary)
```

##

```{r}
#| eval: false

year_summary |>
  collect() |>
  class()
```

## Under the hood...

```{r}
#| eval: false

year_summary |>
  show_query()
```

# SQL {.maize}

## Five main clauses:

- `SELECT`
- `FROM`
- `WHERE`
- `ORDER BY`
- `GROUP BY`

. . . 

Every SQL query must have `SELECT` and `FROM`

## Example: 

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
```{r}
#| eval: false

flights |>
  show_query()
```
:::

::: {.column .fragment width="50%"}
SELECT (everything) FROM (the flights database)
:::
:::::

## Example


::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
```{r}
#| eval: false

year_summary |>
  show_query()
```
:::

::: {.column .fragment width="50%"}
- SELECT (the `year` column) .... FROM (the flights database)
- COUNT (all rows) and save it AS a new variable called `n`
- Also, results should be GROUPed BY year
:::
:::::

## Your turn



## Example

```{r}
#| eval: false

flights |>
  filter(dest == "MSP") |>
  arrange(dep_delay)
```
